task_description: Use Cortex LLM functions in SQL for text processing
validation_rules: Must use SNOWFLAKE.CORTEX.SUMMARIZE() for review summaries
Must use SNOWFLAKE.CORTEX.EXTRACT() with JSON prompt
Must process 3-5 rows from each source table
Must create result tables (or use CREATE AS)
COMPLETE results should be descriptive text
SUMMARIZE results should be shorter than original
EXTRACT results should contain structured data
